uses: Fedia olitcria, also known as the Fennel Flower, has been used in traditional medicine for its potential health benefits. Its flowers and leaves are said to have antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can be used to treat various health issues. Additionally, Fedia olitcria has been used to treat digestive problems, such as indigestion and bloating, due to its carminative properties. Further research is needed to confirm the efficacy of Fedia olitcria for medicinal purposes.

constituents: Fedia olitcria, also known as Fried Egg Plant, contains a variety of active constituents that contribute to its medicinal properties. The plant is rich in flavonoids, which are known for their antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects.
